title: Curse of the Azure Bonds TITLE and BIGPIC photoreal prompt ledger
scope: All extracted TITLE and BIGPIC frame images under image-uprez-pipeline/png
notes: The original extraction is the composition authority.

TITLE blocks containing typography are documented as text-free scene/background plates because the prompt template prohibits generated text; use existing HD title-card replacements for final typography.
Existing HD replacements are still documented to keep future regeneration visually cohesive.

images.scene: Reconstruct the wide, oblique overhead fantasy travel map as a physically built, photoreal relief-map landscape while retaining its map readability. The entire frame is continuous green terrain viewed from high above, with no sky and no human figures. A dominant rugged brown-gray mountain chain occupies roughly the left quarter and runs vertically; dark evergreen forest masses cluster across the center and lower half; thin blue rivers and dark winding roads thread between them. Keep the small settlement/fortified-location clusters, circular route nodes, and junctions in their original coordinates. Preserve the pale blue lake or coastal inlet in the upper-right corner and the exact balance of open grassland, woodland, mountains, water, and paths. Natural overcast daylight, restrained greens and earth tones, crisp terrain detail across the full depth.
images.constraints: No eye-level horizon, clouds, labels, lettering, compass rose, decorative border, enlarged landmarks, added towns, armies, people, creatures, or invented monuments. Do not turn it into a flat parchment illustration or satellite image. Keep every route node and major terrain mass fixed; broad depth of field, no miniature tilt-shift blur.
images.note: An HD replacement already exists. Keep this prompt as the cohesion and regeneration specification; the existing replacement remains the first review candidate.

images.scene: Extreme close frontal portrait of one supernatural skull-faced demon filling the central third of an ultra-wide frame. Its pale bone face is centered, symmetrical and staring directly at camera with two small red glowing eyes, a triangular nasal cavity and a broad row of exposed teeth. Pointed ear or horn silhouettes extend sideways. A huge blue-white magical flame, mane, or crown rises above and behind the skull across most of the upper center. Exactly two large dark clawed hands enter from the far left and far right, curling inward to frame but not cover the face. The lower center burns with restrained red-orange fire and smoke while the outer background remains nearly black and deep blue. Hard motivated cyan light from above and ember light from below shape real bone, leathery claws, smoke and flame.
images.constraints: One face and exactly two framing hands only. Do not add a torso, extra skulls, extra eyes, wings, jewelry, text, or scenery. Preserve the very wide negative space and edge-entering hand silhouettes. Do not reinterpret the blue crown as a solid hat or helmet; retain its ambiguous magical flame/aura character. Keep teeth and hand anatomy coherent, terrifying rather than comic, with controlled saturation and readable blacks.
images.note: An HD replacement already exists. Documented for consistent creature realism and as a fallback regeneration brief.

images.scene: Three disembodied villain heads float against a pure black sparse star field in a wide, shallow triangular cluster. Left head occupies approximately x18–46%, y19–89%: an angular gaunt human-like face in three-quarter view facing right, beneath a large sweeping pale-blue/deep-blue hood or headdress that arcs inward. Center head occupies approximately x39–62%, y31–93%: a medium-sized frontal woman positioned lower than both side heads, with a symmetrical face and an ornate circular red-violet headdress or hair mass dotted with small warm gold accents; tiny finger-like shapes may frame the lower chin exactly as in the source. Right head occupies approximately x58–86%, y18–90%: the widest and largest-by-mass creature or villain head, in three-quarter view facing left, with a prominent grin/jaw and a swept-back crest. A continuous restrained red-orange-violet magical arc spans approximately x26–78%, y5–31% above and behind the three heads. Preserve narrow black separation gaps between the faces, large empty black margins at both sides, and sparse tiny white stars. No bodies or ground plane.
images.constraints: Exactly three heads, no fourth face. Keep the center woman lower and medium-sized; the right inward-facing head must remain the largest by mass, and the left inward-facing hood must preserve its long pale-blue arc. Do not pack the heads together or replace the black gaps with hair, robes, fog or nebula. No full bodies, shoulders, extra eyes, floating hands beyond the tiny source-implied shapes under the center chin, weapons, planets, architecture, elaborate clouds, text or border. Preserve the exact wide 38:15 crop, side margins, red halo extent and source bounding boxes. Avoid glamour styling, oversized horns, generic demons, merged anatomy or a dominant enlarged central portrait.
images.note: Prompt corrected during full-auto audit: center scale, right-head dominance, hood arc, face gaps and halo bounds now match the extracted source.

images.scene: Ultra-wide night exterior seen from a low, level viewpoint across rough blue-black ground. The foreground is a shallow band of uneven earth, low scrub and scattered rocks. In the middle distance, a small steep-roofed rural hut stands in the left third, while a lower modest building sits near center, both tiny against the landscape. Sparse tree silhouettes frame the far left and right edges. A large blocky dark stone structure or wall dominates the rightmost quarter, rising from the ground and cropping out at the top/right edge. The background is a flat distant horizon beneath a broad deep-indigo starry sky occupying about half the image. Cold moonless starlight gives faint blue edge highlights; no people or creatures are visible.
images.constraints: No moon, sunrise, torches, windows blazing with light, travelers, animals, castle skyline, mountains, modern fencing, or added village buildings. Keep the right-hand mass large and nearly black, the huts small and low, and the horizon flat. Preserve the quiet empty negative sky and deep focus; do not use fog or shallow depth of field to hide the structures.
images.note: No matching HD replacement found in HDAssets; this is a generation candidate.

images.scene: This source is a typography-only publisher/legal title card on a uniform royal-blue field, not a depictive fantasy scene. For a clean generative scene plate, preserve the exact 8:5 crop and produce only the evenly lit, subtly textured royal-blue background with no objects, figures, horizon, vignette, symbols, or depth cues. The SSI, Advanced Dungeons & Dragons, legal and copyright typography must be composited separately from authoritative assets rather than hallucinated by an image model.
images.constraints: Do not generate or approximate any words, letters, logos, emblems, legal copy, ornamental frame, fantasy scenery, gradient, spotlight, paper texture, or characters. Keep the field uniform and edge-to-edge. Production note: use the existing HD title replacement for the finished title card; this prompt is only for a text-free background plate.
images.note: Complete HD title-card replacement already exists. Retain it; generative output should only be used for a text-free plate if ever needed.

images.scene: One heroic armored woman dominates the center-right in a waist-up portrait, body angled slightly left while her face turns toward the viewer. She has long pale-blonde hair, a visible pointed ear, practical dark steel shoulder armor over leather and cloth, and a cloak; her expression is alert and serious. A long straight sword crosses diagonally through the lower composition from the lower-left toward the right side, held as a strong foreground line. Behind her head, a large cold blue full moon occupies the upper-center and creates a rim light. At the far left edge, retain the partially cropped profile/head of a reptilian humanoid companion looking inward. On the right background, a tall dark stone tower or fortress silhouette rises vertically. The palette is moonlit blue-black with natural skin and metal response, subtle haze and cinematic depth.
images.constraints: Exactly one central woman and one partially cropped reptilian companion at far left; do not remove the companion or turn it into a statue. Do not add enemies, dragons, extra weapons, exposed modern styling, ornate glossy cosplay armor, or text. Preserve the moon size and position, diagonal sword, center-right heroine, left-edge face fragment, and right-side tower. Keep both eyes, hands and sword geometry anatomically coherent and the important background readable.
images.note: A cohesive HD photoreal replacement already exists and also serves as the underlying scene plate for later title blocks.

images.scene: Create a text-free cinematic plate matching the visible background behind the original title logo. In a very wide crop, the same moonlit heroine scene continues: the armored pale-blonde woman occupies the left half, cropped tightly from roughly chest upward and partly obscured by the central negative area reserved for the title overlay; the huge blue moon glows behind her upper body. A partial reptilian companion remains near the far-left edge. Dark blue stone tower and fortress shapes fill the right side, with deep shadow through the center where the original logo sat. Preserve the exact distribution of visible face, armor, moon, tower silhouettes and dark central space, lit by cold moonlight with realistic leather, steel, skin and stone.
images.constraints: No lettering, logo, azure-bond symbol, border, or invented detail inside the deliberately dark central title-safe region. Do not recenter the heroine, expose a full body, enlarge the reptilian companion, add combat, or brighten the tower. Match TITLE block 2 character identity, costume, moonlight and environment for seamless cohesion. Production typography must be composited separately; the existing HD replacement remains authoritative for the finished logo card.
images.note: Finished HD title replacement already exists. This prompt specifies the underlying text-free photoreal scene plate and continuity with TITLE block 2.

images.scene: Create a text-free ultra-wide continuation of the same moonlit title artwork. The pale-blonde armored heroine is cropped into the left third, her head and upper torso silhouetted against a large blue moon near the upper-left. The reptilian companion remains only as a narrow partial face/shoulder fragment at the extreme left. Most of the center is dark blue negative space reserved for the original Forgotten Realms plaque, while a tall shadowed stone tower and adjoining fortress forms anchor the right third. Preserve the low-detail darkness beneath the former subtitle area and the exact left-heavy character/right-heavy architecture balance. Use physically coherent cold moon rim light, restrained blue grading and photoreal steel, leather, hair, skin and masonry.
images.constraints: No words, gold plaque, logo, subtitle, border, runes, or decorative crest in the central title-safe area. Do not fill the negative space, shift the moon, recenter the heroine, reveal more of the companion, or invent a cityscape. Maintain exact character and costume continuity with TITLE blocks 2 and 3. The existing HD replacement should be used for the final typography-bearing screen; this prompt is for a clean scene plate only.
images.note: Finished HD title replacement already exists. Documented as a text-free plate specification for cohesion across the title sequence.
